title: Docker Compose Quiz
description: Test your knowledge on defining multi-container Docker applications.

questions.question: Regarding the DevOps, what is the primary role of 'Docker Compose'?
options: To define and run multi-container Docker applications using a single YAML configuration file

questions.question: Which configuration file is used in Docker Compose to define how a project's services—such as its API and database—are launched and linked?
